---
title: "Master of Science, Forest Resources & Conservation"
description: "Thesis: Large Wildfire Patterns in the WUI · 4.0 GPA"
org: "University of Florida"
org-url: "https://www.ufl.edu/"
date: "2023-08-01"
dates: "Aug 2023 – Aug 2025"
location: "Gainesville, FL"
categories: [Education]
---

::: {.nw-detail-lead}
<a class="nw-tl-org" href="https://www.ufl.edu/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">University of Florida</a> · Aug 2023 – Aug 2025 · Gainesville, FL
:::

I earned my M.S. in Forest Resources & Conservation from the University of Florida's School of Forest, Fisheries, and Geomatic Sciences, graduating with a 4.0 GPA.

My thesis, *Large Wildfire Patterns in the Wildland-Urban Interface*, used geospatial analysis to examine how large wildfires interact with the WUI across the eastern United States. The research earned Outstanding Thesis recognition from both the College of Agricultural & Life Sciences and the School of Forest, Fisheries, & Geomatic Sciences.
